text:
Once upon a very long time ago, there were two best friends, Ellie and Sam.

They'd bike explore every day. Their favorite park was the old giant elm tree. They'd find the best spots to swing.

Once Ellie discovered a secret garden. She never told Sam about it.

She'd go there after school to read books really quietly. The plants knew secrets. It's where old wind-up clocks lived.

One night when it rained frogs, Ellie fell into the biggest puddle. She couldn't climb out.

Sam flew down from the clouds. He said,

"Ellie, it's just mud. You'll be okay. I'll even give you some cocoa."

He took out a cozy book with pictures of owls. That book had lots of books of its own. After a long time, Ellie hopped out.

She went home with a book about owls. She loved it.

Every night she'd hop into bed before owls.

That's why Ellie never
